headline: Chief Marketing Officer ( CMO ) - Mubashir
summary:
Co-founder mubashir ( largest digital out of home company in Oman )

Work experience :

2002 Apex media : reporter for the week news paper , where I interviewed the Star Cheffs of oman and wrote articles about the cuisine. ( it built my communication and confidence levels, plus I had allot of free delicious dishes ).

2003-2005 Bank Muscat:

bankassurance Business manager.
Great sales experience and so many training courses. ( I developed my sales skills and customer service skills with the best trainers).

2005-2012 Oman Oil Marketing Co:

worked in many departments, marketing different products and services , had the honor of being the export manager for oman oil lubes in the MENA region. ( 7 years of learning and working with great managers and CEO ).

2013-2016 Shell Oman Marketing Co:

Joining a top leading global brand marketing department has been the best learning experience anyone could wish for , as a project manager I had to connect with shell Thailand , Philippines, turkey and holland to bring the latest marketing initiatives to Oman.

Mubashir :

A dynamic exciting ad tech company that believes in the power of digital OOH advertising and measurability.

Mubashir first project implementation is the customer interface screens at shell oman pumps, which makes Oman the first country in MENA region with such a smart technology.

My mission is to market mubashir and our ad networks to private and govt sectors securing strategic partnerships to utilize Mubashir digital channel to display smart ads, csr initiatives , events and relevant information to engage with the public in a personal unique way.

Make every day count, and let us continue learning.

Khalid Alawad.

experiences.title: Marketing & Communication Manager ( marcom)
experiences.description: Marketing mubashir products, and services in Oman and abroad while creating strategic partnerships with private and government entities.
